title: Universal Software Project Checklist
description: A base checklist for any software project. Use the core phases for every project, then attach relevant add-on modules based on what you are building.

tags.must: Non-negotiable. Skipping this breaks the project or client relationship.
tags.caution: Will cause serious problems later if ignored.
tags.tip: Professional extra that separates good from great.

modules.description: Add relevant module task lists to Phase 2 (Planning) and Phase 4 (Development) based on project type.

tasks.text: Define the core problem the software will solve
Identify the target users (who will use this daily?)
Understand how the client plans to make money or derive value from this
Research competitors and existing solutions in the market
Define what success looks like (KPIs, metrics, launch goals)
List all features the client wants (brain dump, no filtering yet)
Separate features into: Must Have (MVP) vs Nice to Have vs Future
Define user roles and permission levels (admin, user, guest, etc.)
Identify any third-party integrations needed
Clarify data ownership, privacy, and compliance requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, etc.)
Document all requirements in a clear PRD (Product Requirements Doc)
Agree on budget and payment milestones
Sign a contract with scope, timeline, revision policy, and IP ownership
Agree on communication channel and meeting cadence
Set up a shared project management board (Notion, Jira, Linear, Trello)
Define change request policy for scope changes mid-project

phases.title: Phase 2 — Planning & Architecture
phases.note: Attach relevant add-on module planning tasks to this phase.

tasks.text: Choose the tech stack (frontend, backend, database, hosting)
Design the database schema and data models
Plan the API structure and key endpoints
Define authentication method (email/password, OAuth, SSO, magic link)
Plan file storage strategy if needed (AWS S3, Cloudinary, etc.)
Choose hosting and infrastructure provider
Plan scalability requirements from the start
Break all features into small, estimable development tasks
Create a sprint plan or development roadmap with milestones
Set up version control repository (GitHub, GitLab)
Define branching strategy (main, dev, feature branches)
Set up staging and production environments
Map out all user flows for every major feature
Create low-fidelity wireframes for every key screen
Plan empty states (what does the app look like before data exists?)
Plan error states and loading states for all key actions
Design onboarding flow for new users
Define design system: colors, typography, spacing, and component library
Design high-fidelity mockups for all screens
Design email templates (welcome, notifications, password reset)
Ensure designs are responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Ensure designs meet WCAG accessibility standards
Get client approval on all designs before development starts

phases.title: Phase 4 — Development
phases.note: Attach relevant add-on module development tasks to this phase.

tasks.text: Set up project boilerplate and folder structure
Configure environment variables and secrets management
Set up CI/CD pipeline for automatic deployments
Set up linting, formatting, and code standards
Set up error logging and monitoring (Sentry, Datadog, etc.)
Build authentication system (sign up, log in, log out, password reset)
Build user dashboard and core app layout
Build all MVP features as defined in the PRD
Build admin panel for the client to manage users and data
Implement role-based access control (RBAC)
Build email notification system (transactional emails)
Build all third-party integrations
Implement input validation on all forms (frontend + backend)
Protect all API routes with proper authentication middleware
Set up automated database backups
Implement rate limiting to prevent API abuse
Ensure passwords are hashed and sensitive data is encrypted
Test every user flow end-to-end
Test all edge cases: empty inputs, max limits, duplicate entries
Test all user roles and permission restrictions
Test all email notifications are triggered and received correctly
Write and run unit tests for critical business logic
Run integration tests on key API endpoints
Test on multiple browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge)
Test on mobile devices (iOS Safari, Android Chrome)
Run a load/performance test to check behavior under traffic
Run a security audit — check for XSS, CSRF, SQL injection vulnerabilities
Share staging environment with client for review
Run a live walkthrough of all features with the client
Collect feedback, apply revisions, and re-test changed areas
Get written sign-off from client before going live
Set up custom domain and SSL certificate
Configure all production environment variables
Run final full regression test on production environment
Set up uptime monitoring (UptimeRobot, Better Uptime)
Prepare a rollback plan in case something breaks
Set up analytics tracking
Deploy to production
Smoke-test all critical flows immediately after deploy
Confirm auth and emails work correctly in production
Deliver all credentials (hosting, domain, admin panel, repo access)
Provide documentation on how to manage the system
Record a walkthrough video of the admin panel for the client
Hand over codebase with a clear README and setup instructions
Set a 30-day post-launch check-in to review bugs and feedback
Monitor error logs and fix production bugs within agreed SLA
Review analytics to identify usage patterns and drop-off points
Plan Phase 2 features based on real user feedback
Discuss ongoing maintenance retainer if client needs continued support

saas.title: SaaS Add-on Module
saas.description: Attach these tasks when building a subscription-based SaaS product.

tasks.text: Define subscription plans and pricing tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
Plan billing and payment flow (Stripe, Paddle, LemonSqueezy)
Define trial period logic (free trial, freemium, demo)
Plan email notification system (welcome, invoices, upgrade prompts)
Define multi-tenancy model if applicable (one DB per tenant vs shared DB)
Build billing and subscription system with Stripe or equivalent
Implement plan-based feature gating (lock features behind paid tiers)
Build usage tracking if plans are usage-based
Handle webhook events from billing provider (payment failed, subscription cancelled)
Build customer billing portal (view invoices, update payment method, cancel)
Test billing flows: upgrade, downgrade, cancellation, and failed payment
Test that feature gating correctly restricts access per plan
Test webhook handling for all billing events

mobile.title: Mobile App Add-on Module
mobile.description: Attach these tasks when building a native or cross-platform mobile app (iOS / Android).

tasks.text: Decide on framework: native (Swift/Kotlin) or cross-platform (React Native, Flutter)
Define which platforms are in scope: iOS, Android, or both
Plan push notification strategy and provider (FCM, APNs, OneSignal)
Plan offline support and local data caching strategy
Review App Store and Google Play submission requirements early
Build deep linking support for notifications and shared links
Implement push notification system
Implement biometric authentication (Face ID, fingerprint) if required
Handle app permissions gracefully (camera, location, notifications)
Optimize for battery and memory usage
Test on real physical devices (not just simulators)
Test on multiple iOS versions and Android API levels
Test push notifications end-to-end
Test offline mode and reconnection behavior
Prepare App Store listing: screenshots, description, keywords, privacy policy
Prepare Google Play listing with the same assets
Submit to TestFlight (iOS) and Internal Testing (Android) first
Submit for App Store and Google Play review
Plan for review turnaround time (Apple: 1-3 days, Google: a few hours)

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Add-on Module
ecommerce.description: Attach these tasks when building an online store or shopping experience.

tasks.text: Define product catalog structure (categories, variants, attributes)
Plan inventory management approach
Choose and plan payment gateway (Stripe, PayPal, local providers)
Plan shipping logic (flat rate, weight-based, real-time carrier rates)
Define tax calculation strategy (by region, product type, etc.)
Plan return and refund flow
Build product listing and detail pages
Build shopping cart and checkout flow
Implement payment processing with success and failure handling
Build order management system for the client (view, fulfill, refund orders)
Build inventory tracking and low-stock alerts
Implement discount codes and promotions logic
Send transactional emails: order confirmation, shipping update, refund
Integrate shipping provider API for label generation or tracking
Test full checkout flow with real test payments
Test payment failure and decline handling
Test discount codes, edge cases, and expiry logic
Test order confirmation and shipping emails
Test inventory decrement after successful purchase

internal_tool.title: Internal Tool Add-on Module
internal_tool.description: Attach these tasks when building a dashboard, CRM, ERP, or internal business tool.

tasks.text: Map all existing workflows the tool will replace or improve
Plan SSO or company identity provider integration (Google, Azure AD, Okta)
Identify existing data sources to import or connect (spreadsheets, old DBs)
Define data export requirements (CSV, PDF reports, API access)
Build data import tool for migrating existing data
Build reporting and export features (CSV, PDF, charts)
Implement audit logs so admins can see who changed what
Build bulk action support for managing large datasets

marketplace.title: Marketplace Add-on Module
marketplace.description: Attach these tasks when building a two-sided marketplace (buyers and sellers).

tasks.text: Define the two sides clearly: who are the buyers and who are the sellers?
Plan the commission or fee model (flat fee, percentage, subscription)
Plan seller payout flow (Stripe Connect, manual payouts)
Plan trust and safety features (reviews, verification, dispute resolution)
Define how listings are created, approved, and managed
Build seller onboarding flow and profile setup
Build listing creation, editing, and management for sellers
Build search and filter functionality for buyers
Build booking, ordering, or purchasing flow
Build seller payout system with Stripe Connect or equivalent
Build review and rating system for both sides
Build messaging system between buyers and sellers
Build admin moderation tools (approve listings, handle disputes, ban users)
Test full buyer journey: browse → book/buy → pay → review
Test full seller journey: onboard → list → receive booking → get paid
Test commission deduction and payout flow end-to-end
Test dispute and refund scenarios
